title: Voucher Schema
description: Schema for payment vouchers used in the PNM system

payerAddress.description: Ethereum address of the payer in hexadecimal format

payeeAddress.description: Ethereum address of the payee in hexadecimal format

amount.description: Payment amount in smallest token unit (wei for ETH)

cumulative.description: Cumulative amount spent in smallest token unit

counter.description: Monotonic sequence number for voucher ordering

expiry.description: Unix timestamp when the voucher expires

slipId.description: Unique identifier for the voucher slip (UUID format)

contractAddress.description: Vault contract address in hexadecimal format

metadata.description: Optional metadata object for additional voucher information

signature.description: Cryptographic signature of the voucher in hexadecimal format

publicKey.description: P-256 public key for signature verification (optional)

originalVoucherJson.description: Original voucher JSON that was signed (optional, for P-256 verification)
